subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the Sinaitic Tree! Years and months have passed away, nay, ages have elapsed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الکریم من سدره السیناء قد قضت السنون و الشهور بل مضت الاحقاب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
